title: Multi-Target Neuroprotection of Salvia officinalis Aqueous Extract in a Scopolamine-Induced Model of Alzheimer's Disease: Comparative Efficacy Versus Donepezil.
snippet: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a complex, age-related, neurodegenerative disorder that involves cognitive deterioration, oxidative stress, and neuroinflammation. Symptomatic relief is limited with conventional treatments such as donepezil, sparking a significant interest in multi-target botanicals. We examined the neuroprotective effects of Salvia officinalis....
